sections.paragraph:
[Arioch], Assyriaco-Chaldaic pr.n.-

(1) of a king of the land of Ellasar, Gen 14:1, Gen 14:9compare Jdt_1:6 .-(2) of the captain of the royal guard in the court of Babylon, Dan 2:14. Properly lion-like man, from אֲרִי and the syllable اك, with which adjectives end in Persic. [“Sanscr. Arjaka, to be reverenced. Bohlen.” Ges. add.]
